features: Find your calm amidst the everyday chaos with our delicious UK-crafted Lightly Sparkling Drinks. Enriched with 120MG of Magnesium Citrate and botanicals like Lion's Mane and Chamomile, each 27 CALORIES sip contains 0G ADDED SUGAR.
Magnesium Citrate contributes to normal psychological health, promoting resilience for a balanced lifestyle.
SUSTAINABILITY - Our commitment is reflected in the 100% recyclable packaging of our vegan drinks, ensuring that your enjoyment contributes positively to the environment.
NO ADDED SUGAR - the natural flavors of our carefully selected botanicals shine through, providing a pure and refreshing taste experience that supports your health and focus.
description: Product Description Find your calm amidst the everyday chaos with our UK-crafted Lightly Sparkling Drinks. Enriched with 120MG of Magnesium and botanicals like Lion's Mane and Chamomile, each 23 CALORIES sip contains 0G ADDED SUGAR. Ingredients NGREDIENTS: Sparkling water, fruit juices from concentrate (26%) (prange, blood orange (5%), lime), erythritol, magnesium citrate, otic acid, botanical extracts (lion's mane, lemon balm, chamomile) natural flavourings, stevia. Safety Warning If pregnant or breastfeeding, consult a GP. Manufacturer Contact Information Unit 5 Drakes Courtyard, 291 Kilburn High Road, London, England, NW6 7JR See more
